imports_parse_success_rate_check.name: imports_parse_success_rate_check
imports_parse_success_rate_check.value: parse_success_rate IS NULL OR (parse_success_rate >= 0 AND parse_success_rate <= 100)

imports_profile_confidence_check.name: imports_profile_confidence_check
imports_profile_confidence_check.value: profile_confidence IS NULL OR (profile_confidence >= 0 AND profile_confidence <= 1)

reconciliation_runs_match_rate_check.name: reconciliation_runs_match_rate_check
reconciliation_runs_match_rate_check.value: match_rate IS NULL OR (match_rate >= 0 AND match_rate <= 100)

reconciliation_runs_completed_at_check.name: reconciliation_runs_completed_at_check
reconciliation_runs_completed_at_check.value: completed_at IS NULL OR completed_at >= started_at

statement_profiles_success_rate_check.name: statement_profiles_success_rate_check
statement_profiles_success_rate_check.value: success_rate IS NULL OR (success_rate >= 0 AND success_rate <= 100)

users_end_date_check.name: users_end_date_check
users_end_date_check.value: subscription_end_date IS NULL OR subscription_end_date >= created_at

users_subscription_check.name: users_subscription_check
users_subscription_check.value: (subscription_status = 'TRIAL' AND trial_expires_at IS NOT NULL) OR (subscription_status = 'ACTIVE' AND subscription_end_date IS NOT NULL) OR (subscription_status = 'EXPIRED' AND (trial_expires_at IS NOT NULL OR subscription_end_date IS NOT NULL))
